sections.title: If the player has not started Fremennik Trials

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there! Who are you?

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: Get away! I do not speak to outlanders.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there! Who are you?

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: Hi there [player name]. I am Falo the bard! Like my brother Olaf, who lives in Rellekka, I also write music.

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: Hi there [Fremennik name]. I am Falo the bard! Like my brother Olaf, who lives in Rellekka, I also write music.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you write about anything in particular?

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: Oh most certainly! I write about all the objects in the lands. From weapons and armour to palm trees and sands. That's why I wander far from Rellekka to seek inspiration.

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: I have one problem though. I am very forgetful, I can never remember which particular object a song was about.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Surely the lyrics for such a song would be enough to help you remember?

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: I am afraid not. It saddens me deeply, so I often send out messages to adventurers to help me discreetly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll keep a look out for them! Goodbye Falo.

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: I really hope you can help me. Please show me the object my song is about!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you sing me the song again?

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: Okay, here goes... [random song]

sections.title: When the correct item is used on him

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: Yes yes yes! That is it, thank you so much [Fremennik name]. The memories have come flooding back. I get why the lyrics are what they are now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm glad to have helped, hopefully you'll never forget again!

sections.title: When an incorrect item is used on him

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: No no no! That's not it. Please have another think about it, [Fremennik name].

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: Thank you for coming [Fremennik name], I need your help.

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: I have one of my old songs stuck in my head, but I cannot remember what the object it refers to is. I am so forgetful. I'll sing it to you.

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: Here goes... [one of his random songs]

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What a beautiful song!

lines.speaker: Falo the Bard
lines.text: You have very kind words. I would be extremely grateful if you could remind me which object the song was about.
